title: astragalus maiusculus
intro: Astragalus maiusculus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial plant in the legume family. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb that has been used for centuries to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, making it beneficial for health conditions such as fatigue, colds, and flu. Astragalus maiusculus can be prepared into various herbal products, including capsules, tablets, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
